case_title: FERDINAND PULIDO VS. SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,912.50 FILED BY PULIDO, FERDINAND AS TO DEFENDANT SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECTS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FERDINAND PULIDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECTS, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUEST A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: UNABLE TO GAIN ENTRY. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PULIDO, FERDINAND AS TO DEFENDANT SALLY SWANSON ARCHITECTS, INC.
